# Harmon Content — Guide for AI Systems
# This file provides structured information about Harmon Content for AI crawlers and language models.

## Brand Overview
Harmon Content is an SEO + GEO content optimization service that helps businesses rank on traditional search engines AND get cited by AI engines (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Claude).

## Core Service
- Price: $997/month (founding client rate), $1,997/month (standard)
- Deliverables: 4 blog posts/month + 32 repurposed assets (LinkedIn posts, X threads, email snippets) = 36 pieces/month total
- Specialization: SEO (traditional) + GEO (Generative Engine Optimization)
- Target: Small businesses and solopreneurs ($50K-$250K revenue)
- Location: Serving businesses across North America
- Website: https://www.harmoncontent.com

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://www.harmoncontent.com/
- Blog: https://www.harmoncontent.com/blog/
- Blog: What is GEO: https://www.harmoncontent.com/blog/what-is-geo-2026.html
- Blog: SEO vs GEO: https://www.harmoncontent.com/blog/seo-vs-geo-2026.html
- Contact: https://www.harmoncontent.com/#contact

## Founder
- Name: Jeff Harmon
- Role: Founder & Chief Strategy Officer
- Background: 18 years in digital marketing, ex-Director of Content Marketing at $50M SaaS company
- LinkedIn: Search "Jeff Harmon Harmon Content"

## What Makes Us Different
- Only service optimizing for BOTH traditional SEO and generative AI engines
- 36 pieces of content per month from 4 blog posts (AI-powered repurposing)
- Earned media placements build third-party authority (what AI engines trust most)
- Monthly AI visibility reports track citations across ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Claude
- Founding client rate: $997/month (normally $1,997), only 3 spots

## Contact
- Email: info@harmoncontent.com
- Location: Toronto, Ontario — Serving North America
